name: whisper-guard
description: Whisper Guard browser extension: the Whisper security graph native in your browser. Live per-site safety verdicts, a where-your-devices-go dashboard, on-device look-alike protection, and optional browser-as-endpoint egress. MIT, MV3, Chromium + Firefox.

scripts.build: npm run typecheck && node scripts/build.mjs chromium && node scripts/build.mjs firefox
scripts.build:chromium: npm run typecheck && node scripts/build.mjs chromium
scripts.build:firefox: npm run typecheck && node scripts/build.mjs firefox
scripts.e2e: playwright test e2e/mocked.spec.ts e2e/dashboard.spec.ts e2e/egress.spec.ts e2e/enroll.spec.ts e2e/links.spec.ts e2e/shield.spec.ts

author: Whisper Security (viaGraph B.V.)
